ddls:
CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the outlet */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the outlet is located */,
  "supply_point" TEXT /* Supply point for the outlet */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the outlet */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply event */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet receiving the supply */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type being supplied */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of fuel supplied */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the supply */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., truck, pipeline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_supplies_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_supplies_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_supplies_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "current_quantity" REAL /* Current quantity of fuel in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Reorder level for the fuel type */,
  "reorder_quantity" REAL /* Quantity to reorder when the level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of fuel consumption */,
  "quantity_consumed" REAL /* Quantity of fuel consumed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)
